parameters.query:
SELECT up.*, g.goal_type, g.target_weight_kg AS target_weight, u.first_name
FROM user_profiles up
JOIN users u ON up.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN goals g ON up.user_id = g.user_id AND g.is_active = true
WHERE up.user_id = $1;

SELECT mp.plan_date, mp.plan_json
FROM meal_plans mp
WHERE mp.user_id = $1
  AND mp.plan_date >= ($2::date - INTERVAL '3 days')
  AND mp.plan_date < $2::date
ORDER BY mp.plan_date DESC;

SELECT
  dt.calories_consumed,
  dt.protein_consumed_g,
  dt.carbs_consumed_g,
  dt.fat_consumed_g,
  dt.meals_logged
FROM daily_targets dt
WHERE dt.user_id = $1
  AND dt.target_date = ($2::date - INTERVAL '1 day');

SELECT
  AVG(calories_consumed) AS avg_calories,
  AVG(protein_consumed_g) AS avg_protein
FROM daily_targets
WHERE user_id = $1
  AND target_date >= date_trunc('week', $2::date)
  AND target_date < $2::date
  AND meals_logged > 0;

messageValues.message: Eres un nutriologo experto. Responde SOLO con JSON valido, sin texto adicional.

nodes.name: Deactivate Previous Plan for Same Date

parameters.query:
UPDATE meal_plans
SET is_active = false
WHERE user_id = $1
  AND plan_date = $2::date
  AND is_active = true;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Parse and Validate Plan').first().json.userId, $('Parse and Validate Plan').first().json.planDate] }}

={{ [$('Parse and Validate Plan').first().json.userId, $('Parse and Validate Plan').first().json.planDate, JSON.stringify($('Parse and Validate Plan').first().json.plan), $('Parse and Validate Plan').first().json.totalCalories] }}

main.node: Deactivate Previous Plan for Same Date
